Join us TONIGHT for our FIRST PTA 
General Meeting of the 
2025-2026 school year! 
Wednesday, September 17
7:30-8:30 PM ET via Zoom
Click to join meeting
We look forward to seeing you there!

ST. CLOUD PTA
EN R IC H M EN T  PR O G R A M ENRICHMEN T  PR O G R A M
IF YOU’RE AN EXISTING MEMBER OF THE
2025-26 SCHOOL YEAR OR JOIN THE PTA
BEFORE 11:59PM ON WEDNESDAY, SEP 17,
YOU ARE ENTERED INTO A RAFFLE TO WIN
EARLY REGISTRATION! 
A FTER  SC H O O LRegistrationRegistration
Opens on
Sunday, Sep 21
FALLEARLY REGISTRATIO N
RAFFLE FO R PTA M EM BERS
- ENDS TO NIGHT!EARLY REGISTRATIO N
RAFFLE FO R PTA M EM BERS
- ENDS TONIGHT!at 7:00pm
2025If new, create an account at
HOMEROOM.COM
TO JOIN THE PTA AND SEE MORE
DETAILS OF THE ASP PROGRAM,
SCAN THE QR CODE OR VISIT:PROGRAM VOLUNTEERS ARE
GUARANTEED EARLY SIGNUPS! 
bit.ly/aspstcloud

ST. CLOUD PTA
EN R IC H M EN T  PR O G R A M ENRICHMEN T  PR O G R A M
A FTER  SC H O O LASP is looking for PROGRAM
VOLUNTEERS to help our coordinators
with getting children to and from the
classrooms safely.
You will need to be on site for the
program from 3:15 - 4:30pm once a week. 
*The perk of being a parent volunteer is
you get to register early for your
children’s program*PROGRAM VOLUNTEERS NEEDED PROGRAM VOLUNTEERS NEEDED
Em ail 
asp@ stcloudpta.org
to volunteer

St. Cloud Diversity Council St. Cloud Diversity Council
JOIN US!! First Meeting: 9/24, 8:30pm ON
ZOOM (Link provided thru mailing list)
Join our mailing list and to offer your
ideas! Sign up here:
bit.ly/StCloudDiversityCouncil
DiversityCouncilStC@gmail.com
WHAT DO WE DO?
Plan events to
celebrate and elevate
diversity and inclusion
Engage in direct
communication with
school and district
leadership regarding
diversity and inclusionMeet monthly on Zoom
to bring awareness to
issues of diversity and
inclusion in our
community and plan
for actionHighllights from 24-25:  
Ruby Bridges Walk
 to School DayShare Your Story with 25
Local Authors
Student-led assemby  
about Ramadan
Gift collection and
wrapping for students
across the district
Round Table Discussion
for Adults about
Important Topics

TRUNK OR
TREAT!TRUNK OR
TREAT!S A T U R D A YST. CLOUD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PTA PRESENTS
OCT 18 OCT 18
2-4PMHOST A TRUNK HOST A TRUNK
LOOKING FOR TRUNK HOSTS FOR
OUR ANNUAL SPOOK-TACULAR!
Win PRIZES for best trunk!
No time to plan a theme or shop for candy?
Grab a pre-packaged theme kit from the
store and/or ask the PTA for candy on the
day of the event!Don ’ t want to host alone? Make it more fun
by hosting with friends!
SCAN QR CODE TO
SIGNUP AS A
TRUNK HOST
OR VISIT:
bit.ly/trunkhost25

TREAT
DONATIONSTREAT
DONATIONS
- REGULAR CANDY
- ALLERGY-FRIENDLY CANDY LIKE
STARBURSTS, SMARTIES, DUM DUMS,
SWEDISH FISH, ETC
- NON-CANDY TREATS LIKE GLOWSTICKS,
PLAYDOH, PENCILS, ETC WE ’RE LOOKING FOR CANDY AND NON-
CANDY TREAT DONATIONS TO MAKE
TRUNK OR TREAT A FA-BOO-LOUS EVENT
FOR ALL! PLEASE CONSIDER DONATING THE
FOLLOWING:ST. CLOUD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL PTA
Send your donations to school with your child

COSTUMES,

AND
COLLECTION

COSTUME

THERE IS A

JUST SEND YOUR
